subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf of the Divine Lote-Tree! From the direction of the Prison doth the Tree summon thee. On this Day Mount Sinai hath attained unto supreme joy, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی سدره از شطر سجن ترا ندا مینماید امروز طور بفرح اکبر فائز چه که
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
